abort.bluetooth_not_available: At least one Bluetooth adapter or remote must be configured to use iBeacon Tracker.

user.description: Do you want to set up iBeacon Tracker?

error.invalid_beacon_id_format: Beacon IDs should use UUID_MAJOR_MINOR format, where major and minor are in the range 0-65535
error.invalid_uuid_format: UUIDs should contain 32 hex characters grouped as XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX

data.allow_nameless_uuids: Currently allowed UUIDs. Uncheck to remove
data.allowed_beacons: Currently allowed beacon IDs. Uncheck to remove
data.new_allowed_beacon: Enter a new allowed beacon ID

init.description: By default, all iBeacons are tracked. To only track specific beacons, add allowed beacon IDs in UUID_MAJOR_MINOR format (for example, 426c7565-4368-6172-6d42-6561636f6e73_65262_65037). iBeacons with an empty device name are ignored unless their UUID is explicitly allowed below.
